entry.title: Re: ABAP Proxy Transfoms ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, marcospera.

In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, you can create transformations to get the XML.

  METHOD generate_xml.

Example:

    CALL TRANSFORMATION zdemo_xml

              SOURCE ecf = i_ecf

              RESULT XML r_xml.

 

  ENDMETHOD.

I hope you find it useful.

best regards

entry.title: Re: Group Self Intro
entry.content: Welcome Ajay!  Happy to meet you.

entry.title: Re: Newcomer to SAP
entry.content: Hola Ricardo!  Mellamo Josh.  FYI there are first ever SAP CodeJams happening in Mexico City on Aug 7th ant 8th as part of the 2025 #LATAM roadshow by the Developer Advocates.  If close by please join or at last come to the meetup (Quedada) the night of Aug 7th

entry.title: Re: Hello from Rio de Janeiro!
entry.content: Great to meet you!  Sorry I will only be in Sâo Paulo this year.  Tchau

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup em São Paulo – Um Encontro Antes do SITSP!
entry.content:
Esta é a versão Brasileira do evento Encontro SAP - Let's talk about Joule (meetup / SAP Stammtisch) 

No clima do SAP CodeJam e na véspera do SAP Inside Track São Paulo, a comunidade SAP local vai se reunir para um bate-papo informal, relaxado e fora do escritório, no dia 25 de julho de 2025, às 18h.

***Local a ser definido em breve***

Esse encontro não é palestra, nem workshop — é conexão humana. Não importa se você vai participar do CodeJam ou do SITSP Functional edition ou Developer edition, se você é dev, curioso, consultor, ou simplesmente gosta de conversar sobre SAP, você está mais do que convidado!

A ideia é simples: sentar com a galera, falar sobre o que tem de novo no mundo SAP, trocar experiências de projetos, rir um pouco, compartilhar ideias e fazer networking real, de verdade, olho no olho.

Vamos escolher um local perto do SAP CodeJam ou do SIT — o importante é juntar a comunidade.

A consumação é por conta de cada um, mas a vontade de trocar ideia já é o suficiente para participar.

Confirme presença clicando em “I will attend” no link do evento.

Bora se encontrar, bater um papo e fortalecer a comunidade SAP em São Paulo!

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Request for Hamburg - ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
entry.content: happy to be back, although more in the RAP corner 😉

entry.title: Re: CoA is not printing automatically after Post Goods issue for delivery.
entry.content: COA you mean - Chart of Accounts you want to print in material document?

entry.title: Re: How to update or remove notification emails using the...
entry.content: Thanks Michael, that helped point me in the right direction. I was able to clear both the success and failure notifications.

entry.title: Re: How to update or remove notification emails using the...
entry.content:
Here's what I ended up using:

try {
	oInfoObject = (IInfoObject) oInfoObjects.get(i);

	SI_ID = oInfoObject.properties().getProperty("SI_ID").getValue().toString();
	SI_NAME = oInfoObject.properties().getProperty("SI_NAME").getValue().toString();
	System.out.println(SI_ID + ": " + SI_NAME);

	ISchedulingInfo schedulingInfo = (ISchedulingInfo)oInfoObject.getSchedulingInfo();
	INotifications schedulingNotifications = schedulingInfo.getNotifications();
	
	IDestinations notificationDestinations = null;
	
	try {
		notificationDestinations = schedulingNotifications.getDestinationsOnSuccess();
		notificationDestinations.clear();
		iStore.commit(oInfoObjects);
		System.out.println("Success Notifications Cleared");
	} catch (NullPointerException e) {
		System.out.println("Success Notification Exception");
	}
	
	try {
		notificationDestinations = schedulingNotifications.getDestinationsOnFailure();
		notificationDestinations.clear();
		iStore.commit(oInfoObjects);
		System.out.println("Failure Notifications Cleared");
	} catch (NullPointerException e) {
		System.out.println("Failure Notification Exception");
	}
} catch (NullPointerException e) {
	System.out.println("No info");
}

entry.title: TM Freight Order Worklist
entry.content:
Quick question regarding the freight order worklist.  What am I doing wrong when searching Source location 0020002322 and Destination location 0030000005. In my opinion, only Freight Orders with that Source and the Destination location should come up. 

However, freight orders that do not meet any of these search criteria are also displayed (red). Only the green marked Freight orders are correct.

 

Am I doing something wrong with the "=" filter; i.e. should I use something else to only display these two location numbers and drill down on the freight order statuses?

entry.title: Incorrect delivery status "complete" after partial delivery for consig fillup, ABC- storage location
entry.content:
I have implemented ABC storage location for main item category below are settings same for sub item category. Also are listed below the schedule line item category. it is consignment fill-up scenario

1. Upon partially delivering the order line item show as fully delivered

2. Main item is showing open qty 10 where it should be only 1 as that s the open qty. 

Main item category 

respective schedule line item category 

 

Sub Item category 

respective schedule line item category 

Order details below we can see delivered is short but status is complete

 

VA05 open qty issue

entry.title: Re: First Half 2025 Release: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Learning?
entry.content:
I would like to echo @RZAlexander's comments -- xAPI/cmi5 support would be excellent!

We experienced some issues with session timeouts using SCORM content and it took quite a long time to resolve. It appears the LMS' interpretation of historical AICC standards for parsing exit behaviour calls results in issues with sessions, unless workarounds (i.e. manually excluding cmi.core.exit functionality by editing the relevant .js files) are performed by modifying SCORM wrappers (that otherwise work without issue in other LMS' our organization works with).

Looking forward to xAPI/cmi5 support - and the related documentation - improving the experience for administrators, learners, and content developers!

Some links for historical reference:

  • Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
  • XAPI Support for SF Learning is coming - what will... - SAP Community

entry.title: Rescheduling of periodic job failed - Company Payment jobs being erased from Production System
entry.content:
Hello everyone, thank you in advance for your attention.

I am having problems in the productive SAP ECC environment related to payment jobs and calendars. I'm constantly scheduling jobs for company payments, which only run on working days, from Monday to Friday, once a day. Some of these jobs are being canceled in production with the following message:

Rescheduling of periodic job failed. Three reasons are possible:
- Restriction (e.g. 'Omit job') with factory calendar EU critical
- Unable to load factory calendar EU or too many public holidays
- Period.job, scheduled for particular day in month, cannot find new date
Invalid start time displayed. Job chain ended.
Unable to find date in calendar. (Is the calendar correct?)
Job canceled

After this log, the job is deleted from production, stopping for good and requiring the entire configuration process to be redone. Some of these jobs run for months, others stop within weeks. What I find strange is the fact that all the calendars used are SAP's own standards, such as EU, CN, NA and so on. Calendars valid until 2030.

Do any of you know how to fix this?
I've searched SAP notes and even another similar post, but I can't find anything to help me.

entry.title: Re: How to send parameter values to SAC Data Action throu...
entry.content: If the data action is being triggered via a story, you can pass the story filter through the Builder panel under the Parameters section.

Kind Regards,

Karthik

entry.content:
Hello, Prasenjitsbist

You can be guided by these examples. Honestly, there are many ways.

 

Forma 1

 

Forma 2

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity : {name: 'ZB_VALUES_MONAT', element: 'value_low'  }, useForValidation: true }]

 

Forma 2

then in the other view the following is added

I hope to see you helped

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Why is SAP Desktop Agen...
entry.content:
Hi Adam,

For Document Extraction, you would have multiple steps including handling of file, which would not be possible based on the current functionality to handle on a process level. You would only have the option to manage this through an automation.

entry.title: Re: Actions in SAP Build Process Automation -- Need to ca...
entry.content:
Hi Parth,

Thanks for sharing the information.

Basically you need to complete the full URL. What this means is:

1. The path that is left over for the calling of your odata service will go to the prefix (Check the full odata URL, insert the path leftover after the path added in your destination, and just before the entity set name in the prefix).

2. Custom Action created should start with "/" followed by your entity set name along with any URL parameters that need to get passed in the API call.

3. These parameters are then defined in the first section of your action call.

4. Anything passed in the body of the payload is defined in the second section (body).

Once all these parameters are defined, on testing you can check if the URL is built and being called as expected, and adjust it as required.

Do let me know in case you need any further pointers.

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: How to provide visibility to all requisitions globally
entry.content:
Currently myself (a Super Admin) and the manager of global Talent Acquisition must proxy as a recruiter to see their requisitions.  We need the ability to view all requisitions globally even though we are not the recruiter for that position.

I've tried to edit Recruiting permissions via manage permission roles but  "View Job Requisitions" permission is not an available option.

Please provide the steps or a KBA to show me how to configure access to and the ability to run a report that contains all requisitions globally without having to proxy as another recruiter.

Thakes for sharing your knowledge.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Copied Over When Adopt Purchase Requisition to Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi Yunika,

There are several reasons, one you are referring the data from PR, and this custom field is also extended in PO.

Another reason in copying requirement, in configuration we defined which data will be copied over from PR to PO. 

these two can be reason of your data getting transfer from PR to PO.

 

thanks,

entry.title: RESULTLOOKUP - Multiple Hierarchies - Data Action
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a cost center dimension which consists of different departments and regions.

we have two hierarchies for the cost center one is the main hierarchy, and the other is the reporting at region as leaf members. 

Requirement: I am trying to enter my allocation percentage at the region level and trying to calculate the data at the department level.

I am trying to Result lookup the two hierarchies in the Same Data Action i.e. one in the MEMBERSET and the other in RESULTLOOKUP.

It's not allowing me. Could you please suggest a solution for this.

 

Regards,

GKDO

entry.title: Re: Error in creation material master MM01
entry.content:
Hi Saurabh,

Please check the number range of your material type configuration, the most common cause is due to someone interfere with number ranges its getting created with existing material and resulting no update in the tables.

entry.title: Re: po output type is blank in ME23N but triggered in change mode ME22N
Re: Mass deletion of handling units in SAP S/4 Public Coud
entry.content:
Hi Customer,

Can you please try it with Handling Unit API (batch call)? Kindly refer to this documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/9ce855c709ce4f5c99b685903461106e/8d7272c1680b448dbe1947b0bbf06722.html?locale=en-US

Best Regards,

Jennifer

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: ABAP in the Cloud: Debugging authorization
entry.content:
Hello,

in order to trace a user and identify which roles or permissions are missing, you can access the following app in the S4 CLOUD system.

App "Display Authorization Trace"

best regards

entry.title: Doesn't seem like for Learning I can use Item Connector to update Library for MS LinkedIn Learning
entry.content:
We are almost done with our SAP SuccessFactors Learning (our LMS) integration with Microsoft LinkedIn Learning (MS LIL).
Our SSO via Microsoft Entra works great.
Using a link embedded in our SAP SuccessFactors Learning we can send our employees to Microsoft LinkedIn Learning and they can complete the Microsoft LinkedIn Learning courses, and the completions reside in our LMS.
So now we are finishing the configuration to allow for certain employees from within the LMS to be able to find and assign and complete their courses from within the LMS.
Our MS LIL courses have all been imported (10600 US-English courses) into the LMS.
They are imported as LMS type of 'External'.
This is where my problem seems to arise.
My thought was I would just use the LMS Item Connector to update the Library (use to be called Catalog) to point to a MS LIL Library I created within the LMS.
I am getting error messages when attempting this, and it looks like the reason is, you can't update any field with a LMS Item type of External using the LMS's Item Connector.
I don't think I have any control in the LMS Item Type and it must be External.
It doesn't appear I can default the LMS Library with a hard coded value either.
Since I can't update the library with the Item Connector, or set the LMS Library with a default value, it appears nothing short of involving (and paying $) to SAP Professional Services to do it is an option.
Can you think of any other way to accomplish this?
I had no idea you couldn't use the Item Connector to update the LMS's Library field for an External Type, so now I feel stuck, when 99% of the project is done.
I just need help with this last piece.

entry.title: How to read WBS information from parked documents created in MIR7?
entry.content:
I tried to find the table where the WBS of a parked document is stored, but I couldn't find it.

Currently, there is a report that shows the FI parked document generated from the MM parked document, and they want to see the WBS information of the document as well.

However, I don't know how to read the WBS information.

Can anyone help me?

entry.title: How to change the background user for SAP Cloud ALM jobs current scheduled?
entry.content:
Hello SAP support,

Is there any quick way to change an user for all the use-case jobs currently scheduled?
Or I have to do it manually for every released job via SM37?

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change the background user for SAP Cloud ALM j...
entry.content:
Hello,


Yes, you can de-register the system under /n/sdf/alm_setup and register again with the new user. 

For that please follow:

  1. Access the transaction code /n/sdf/alm_setup
  2. Click in "unregister"
  3. Add the user on background user
  4. Click in "register" again
  5. The jobs will be re-scheduled. 

Please ensure the new user assigned has the necessary roles as mentioned on guide (required authorization session):

  • SAP S/4HANA and SAP Business Suite 7

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow APAC 2025 : Indore Edition
entry.content:
Dear ALM Community,

Join the SAP ALM Roadshow to learn on how you can shape your ALM Strategy, manage on-premise, cloud & hybrid landscapes and get the most value from your SAP solutions. Experience the enablement of an in-person event, network with experts, and know how you can accelerate your implementation and efficiently operate your SAP landscape using SAP's ALM portfolio. Engage with SAP's ALM experts, product management team, and know what is in it for customers & partners.

Venue:

Yash Technologies, YASH IT PARK, Plot No. 1, Scheme Number 166 Super Corridor Road, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, 452005 | Cafeteria

This is an in-person event and is free to attend.

 Register Now

entry.title: SAP ALM 로드쇼에 참여 하세요
entry.content:
SAP ALM 로드쇼에 참여하셔서 ALM 전략을 수립하는 방법 및 고객의 온프레미스, 클라우드 및 하이브리드 시스템 환경을

관리하는 방법과 SAP 솔루션에서 최대한의 가치를 얻는 방법에 대해 알아보세요.

SAP ALM 포트폴리오를 사용하여 SAP 환경을 효율적으로 운영하고 구현을 가속화하는 방법을 배우고 SAP전문가와

네트워크를 구축할 수 있는 기회를 경험해보세요.  

SAP ALM 전문가와 협력하여 고객과 파트너에게 SAP ALM 구현시 어떤 장점이 있는지 알아보세요.

이 행사는 무료로 참여하실수 있는 오프라인 대면 이벤트 입니다.

장소:  서울시 강남구 남부순환로 2806 군인공제회관 빌딩  SAP 코리아

미팅룸:  28층 평양룸

Register Now

entry.title: Re: Previous year's total cannot be displayed in SAC reports
entry.content:
I think the above information is insufficient.
I will supplement it.

The cumulative amount can be realized with a calculated measure on the model side using YTD.
What I want to do now in the red frame is to display the cumulative amount for 2025 on a different measure (cumulative amount for the previous year) for 2026,

and the cumulative amount for June 2025 in the blue frame on a different measure (cumulative amount for the previous year) for June 2026.
The previous year's amount itself can be produced by the calculated measure.

First sheet: description of what you want to achieve
Second sheet: measure for calculating the cumulative amount
Third sheet: measure for calculating the previous year's amount

entry.title: Re: Introductory Guide to Provisioning of SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content: Very nice blog post and BDC needs more fuel!

entry.title: Re: Integration of SAP Service and Asset Manager & SAP Maintenance Assistant with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
@syam_yalamati We have a use case to demo this capability.  The video shared is not accessible.  Can you please rechck and reshare?

Regards
Siva

entry.title: Re: 在管理付款申请APP页面，执行付款策略时，选择了银行之后，无法选择金融交易类型，导致付款申请无法下推，不能...
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Thanks for your patience.

Through our investigation, we have already started working on adding the "financial transaction type" field, and it is expected to be included in the CE2508 release.

If the app "posting outgoing payments" does not meet your needs, you are welcome to report a case in the FI-LOC-FI-CN component concerning the cash flow statement. Kindly include the documents not reflected, any discrepancies in amounts, and provide as detailed a description of the reproduction steps as possible in the case.

Best regards,

Lola

entry.title: SAP Preferred Success: Join Our SAP Cloud ERP 2508 Release Planning Session!
entry.content:
Get ready to supercharge your SAP Cloud ERP journey! (SAP Cloud ERP known as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition before.) 
We’re thrilled to invite you to our exclusive SAP Preferred Success 2508 Release Planning Session, designed to empower you with the latest changes and ensure a seamless upgrade experience.

Why You Can’t Miss This Session:

  • Discover 2508 Release Dates: Stay ahead with key timelines to plan your release upgrade with confidence.
  • Master the Upgrade Process: Dive into a step-by-step guide to make your transition smooth and efficient.
  • Actionable Next Steps: Learn critical Call to Action items to maximize the value of the 2508 release.
  • Exclusive Resources & Services: Unlock access to tailored tools and expert support to fuel your success.

Event Details:

  • Who: SAP Cloud ERP with SAP Preferred Success Subscription Customers
  • When:
Live SessionDatesRegionLanguageTimeRegistration

SAP Cloud ERP 2508 Release Planning Session

July 16th

APJ

English

13:00-14:00 pm AEST

Register

SAP Cloud ERP 2508 Release Planning Session

July 16th

EMEA/NA

English

4:30-5:30 pm CET

Register

SAP Cloud ERP: 2508 版本升级计划

7月16日

GCR

中文

北京时间2:30PM-3:30PM

注册

SAP Cloud ERP 2508 Release Planning セッション

7月17日

日本

日本語

日本時間2:00PM-3:00PM 

登録
  • How: Register via the registration link. Note: An SAP Preferred Success subscription is required to register and attend these sessions. Before registering for an SAP Preferred Success webinar, a one-time registration is required Register for the SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Preferred Success. Learn more about SAP Preferred Success here.

Take Action Now!

Don’t miss this opportunity to stay ahead of the curve. Register today through the SAP Learning Hub and explore more about SAP Preferred Success at SAP Preferred Success. Got questions? Reach out to us at s4hana_cloud_adoption@sap.com. Visit SAP Preferred Success Release Center for more information and session replays. 

Let’s shape the future of your ERP together! We can’t wait to see you there.

entry.title: Re: 自動付款可否跨公司不同公司幣別進行付款
entry.content: Hello jake, The automatic payment program has a different logic compare to the mannual posting. The automatic payment program needs to consider some other logics like the payment media etc.. Therefore, there are some restrictions for paying company code setting in automatic payment program.

entry.title: E070 and Import History by TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST FM
entry.content:
Dear All,
Hello!

I want to import Transport Request (CTS) by using ABAP Program.
And I found that TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST and CTS_API_IMPORT_CHANGE_REQUEST Function Module.

First, I have tried using CTS_API_IMPORT_CHANGE_REQUEST.
But it only works when the data(R) and cofile(K) file are already transported to target server OS in manual.
That means, if I cannot access the server, I cannot use the FM.

So, I'm trying using TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST.
But it seems that the import operation seems weird.

After Import by TMS_MGR_IMPORT_TR_REQUEST in QAS,
1) RC in Transport Queue : No import steps performed yet
2) Cannot find the CTS Number in E070
3) Cannot find the Request in Import History
4) Cannot find the Request in PRD Queue

I ask for your advice on this matter.
Best Regards,
Lee

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets Migration - Asset Value Date and Depreci...
entry.content: Hi Ayman,

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets Migration - Asset Value Date and Depreci...
entry.content: Hi Ayman, based on your information regarding the transfer date of 30/04/2025, it means you are performing a mid-year migration. Therefore, you need to complete both the cumulative and posted tabs. Please refer to the link for details.https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/asset-accounting-legacy-data-transfer-during-the-fiscal-year-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/14095979

entry.title: API Scope for service key to register S/4HANA and enable the operation monitoring
entry.content:
I need to create a Cloud ALM instance api with restricted scope as described in this article: Managing Scopes | SAP Help Portal.
I want, specifically, to narrow down the scope of this instance (and service key) to only "Job &Automation Monitoring" feature of Cloud ALM. It's unclear which scope I should pick from this list: API Scopes | SAP Help Portal

The objective is to allow an S/4 Public Cloud to send Job data to Calm to receive alerting.
So the service key needs to have enough permission to register the S/4 PERSON_NAME instance into Cloud ALM Job & Automation Monitoring tool, as well as to receive Job details.

This request is for security reason, as I don't want to assign broader role to access everything in Cloud ALM, if this particular system just needs one specific application from Cloud ALM


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: API Scope for service key to register S/4HANA and ena...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

No additional API scope is needed to register the S/4HANA Public/Private Cloud system to SAP Cloud ALM and enable the operation monitoring use case.
For the PUSH-based data collection of the operation monitoring use case, the default API Service key without any additional API scope should work.

Best regards,
Peng

entry.title: Re: Create custom entity with compositions exposed as ODa...
entry.content:
Hello sdig89, good night.

The error message mentions that the property is invalid. You can try with this name “to_BatchDetItemDetails”.

You can also look at the metadata of your service to see what the /$metadata field is called.

I hope I have helped you.

Best regards,

entry.title: Lock geotag location in tcode /SCMTMS/LOC3
entry.content: I want to lock the business partner location geotag. So when there is an address change in the BP tcode, the location geotag in the /SCMTMS/LOC3 tcode does not change. I see there is a tick button in tcode /SCMTMS/LOC3 to lock the geotag, but when I tick and save it always goes back to untick mode. Is there any solution to my problem?

entry.title: SAP ALM Roadshow APAC 2025 : Kolkata Edition
entry.content:
Dear ALM Community,

Join the SAP ALM Roadshow to learn on how you can shape your ALM Strategy, manage on-premise, cloud & hybrid landscapes and get the most value from your SAP solutions. Experience the enablement of an in-person event, network with experts, and know how you can accelerate your implementation and efficiently operate your SAP landscape using SAP's ALM portfolio. Engage with SAP's ALM experts, product management team, and know what is in it for customers & partners.

Venue: St. Xavier's University, Action Area III, B, Newtown, New Town, West Bengal 700160

This is an in-person event and is free to attend.

Register Now

Sorry, we could not authenticate you. Try again.

 

anyone could help me for this ? then I could move on the tutorial

entry.title: Speed Up Check-Ins: AI-Assisted Goods Receipt Analysis in SAP S/4HANA TM 2023
entry.content:
Generative AI is rapidly transforming how enterprises operate, and at SAP, it is not viewed as a standalone innovation—but as an embedded, value-driving component across our business applications. With each release of SAP S/4HANA, new AI-powered features are being introduced to enhance user experience and optimize operations.

One such advancement is available in SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management 2023 FPS01, FPS02 and FPS03 (currently available for private cloud deployments only) —is the AI-assisted Goods Receipt Analysis. This functionality significantly reduces manual effort and processing time at vehicle check-in by automating document verification.

In this blog post, we’ll explore:

  • How the feature works
  • Required configuration steps
  • How to test it in your system

🧠 Architecture Overview

 

      As illustrated in the architecture diagram:

  • A standard ISLM scenario is delivered to support this integration.
  • Delivery or shipping documents (in PDF, JPEG, PNG, or TIFF formats) are attached to Consignment Orders.
  • These attachments are sent to the DOX service via ISLM, which extracts data and maps it to the TM data model.
  • The system identifies the Freight Unit from base document references and updates the consignment order.
  • For shipping documents, Unified Package Building (UPB) is used to derive package hierarchies.

🚚Business Process Context

Imagine a purchasing scenario where both the buyer and supplier use SAP S/4HANA TM (although the supplier’s usage is optional). What’s crucial is a shipping or delivery document with correct references like PO number and material number.

Without AI assistance:

  • Gate operators manually verify paper documents against system data.
  • This process can be time-consuming—especially for large or complex shipments.
  • Even with ASN (Advanced Shipping Notification) processes, many industries require validation against physical documents due to regulatory compliance.

⚙️Configuration Steps

To enable the AI-powered Goods Receipt Analysis feature in SAP S/4HANA TM, follow these key configuration steps:

  1. Set Up Connection for the ISLM Scenario Using the DOX Service Key
    1. Obtain Service Key
      Service key can be obtained by raising an SAP support ticket on component CA-S4H-BTPAI as mentioned in the SAP Help.
    2. Create Connection Mapping
      Configure the communication arrangement in S/4HANA by mapping the service key to the ISLM (Intelligent Scenario Lifecycle Management) scenario. This step establishes the link between S/4HANA and the DOX service.
    3. Deploy and Activate ISLM Scenario
      Deploy the ISLM scenario and activate the necessary services within S/4HANA to enable DOX functionalities.
  2. Configure Attachment type and assign extraction schema
    1. Create attachment types
      New attachment types are required to enable them to attach on consignment orders.
    2. Assign attachment types to supported scenario                                                                                                                                    To make attachment types relevant for data extraction with the Document Information Extraction service, you must assign them to the expected scenarios
    3. Configure Consignment Order Type                                                                                                                                                  Additional configurations on Consignment order to enable unified package building, error handling

🔧Prerequisites

Before diving into the configuration, ensure the following prerequisites are met:

  • Deployment Environment:
    Your SAP S/4HANA system must be deployed on Private Cloud Edition.

              Feature availability by release:

  • Delivery Note Extraction: FPS02+ (or FPS01 via Note 3547430)
  • Shipping Document Extraction: FPS03+ (or FPS02/01 via Note 3589686)
  • S/4HANA User Setup:
    Ensure you have a user in SAP S/4HANA with the following:
    • The SAP_BR_ANALYTICS_SPECIALIST business role
    • The S-ISM-DEPL authorization (this can be on the same or a different user)

With the prerequisites in place, let’s now dive deeper into the detailed configuration and explore how to bring this powerful generative AI feature to life in your SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management system.

1. Set Up Connection for the ISLM Scenario Using the DOX Service Key

For detailed instruction for Steps 1a, 1b and 1c, follow step 1 from my other blog.  If you are on S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, then use ISLM scenario SCMTMS_TMDOX. For FPS02 and 01, use scenario SCMTMS_DOX_DLV_NOTE (if you haven’t implemented note 3589686 mentioned above). You may also refer step 1 from Note 3571036.

2. Configure Attachment type and assign extraction schema in SAP S/4HANA

a.Create attachment types

Create attachment types as shown below via the following customizing activity: Cross-Application Components  Processes and Tools for Enterprise Applications Reusable Objects and Functions for BOPF Environment  Dependent Object Attachment Folder  Maintain Attachment Type Schema

Then assign the attachment type to a schema

b. Assign attachment types to supported scenario

Follow customizing activity: Transportation Management Basic Functions  Document Information Extraction  Assign Attachment Types to Scenario for Document Information Extraction

In the Options for Automated Processing column, choose the expected option from the dropdown list.

Option1: Never submit automatically. - Attachments must be sent to the extraction service manually using the ‘Extract Attachment Data’ button from Consignment UI.

Option2: Submit automatically when uploaded from UI. - Attachments are automatically sent to the extraction service if uploaded using the Insert function on the Attachments tab.

Option3: Submit automatically only when created via message. - Attachments are automatically sent to the extraction service if included in the message used to create the consignment order.

Option4: Always submit automatically. - Attachments are always automatically sent to the extraction service, regardless of how they were uploaded or created.

If you are not able to see ‘Extract Attachment Data’ button on consignment order UI, then verify these settings.

c. Configure Consignment Order Types

On Consignment Order types, enable settings as per below. Maintain the schema defined in step 2a.

Synchronization of predecessor document will enable update of FU based on changes on consignment order (quantity, packages etc.). Handling incorrect inbound message settings helps to create document even if there are errors.

You must also enable unified package building if you expect to have packaging information in shipping document and need system to build package hierarchy. Unified package building settings must be available on the planning profile assigned to the consignment order.

That’s it!!

We have all setup ready, now it’s time to test this feature.

 

🧪 Test the Feature

See the sample shipment document which received from driver at check-in gate. There is no specific format required as such, but it must have references to originating document like purchase order number, material number etc. In this example, there are two deliveries in it referencing two purchase orders and information on how it is packed.

In this scenario there is no ASN sent by supplier, so we create a blank consignment order and attach the PDF copy or image of the shipment document. Then use ‘Extract Attachment Data’ button (see configuration step 2b).

System will send the attachment to BTP DOX service and then create the consignment order items and item hierarchy. If there is mismatch between system data and attachment, then errors will be issued and can work on it from Document Errors tab.

From the above shipment document and extracted data, system create item hierarchy on consignment order as shown below. If the consignment is already created by ASN message, then system compare consignment data with attachment data and if there is mismatch, issue errors. Gate clerk can work on those errors by either accepting extracted data in the attachment or adjust it.

📦Example Output

From the attached document, the system can:

  • Identify the Freight Units
  • Build the package hierarchy (e.g., 2 pallets → 1 with 3 cartons, 1 with 2 cartons)

This level of automation significantly improves operational efficiency at the check-in gate.

✅Conclusion

This AI-powered feature in SAP S/4HANA TM 2023 demonstrates how generative AI can be harnessed to simplify logistics processes. By automating goods receipt verification, enterprises can reduce manual workloads, minimize errors, and ensure faster processing at the receiving dock.

Try it out in your private cloud landscape—and share your feedback or questions in the comments below.

entry.title: Partial Usage Decision in Quality Management SAP Grow
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Is it possible in SAP grow that we partially record the result for inspection lot and then partially post the usage decision also ?

For example : 100 Pc , We want to record the result for 60 Pc first and then post the usage decision for 60 Pc to unrestricted stock first. Later record the result for remaining 40 Pc.

Because we already tried it , but we unable to achieve this.

Any suggestion ?

Thank You!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Anyone Successfully Using SAP Desktop Agent on Mac?
entry.content: Hi @maharana - The MacOS desktop agent is no longer available at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/ for download. However, you can download it from the Lobby -> Control Tower -> Agent update page described here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/sap-build-process-automation-coming-soon-on-macos/ba-p/13577794. Make sure your process automation project settings is configured to use the newer desktop version.

entry.title: Re: Decimal places in currency settings
entry.content: Dear Gohar, Currency codes and decimal places for currency codes are defined in ISO standard 4217. SAP uses this ISO standard for the specification of decimal places for currency codes in table TCURX. The table TCURX is a cross client table and therefore, it has to be the same for all customers, hence, we cannot allow customers to edit this table via a Self Service Configuration UI. Further we cannot allow expert configuration as it might be reset at the next release upgrade. You may also refer to below Help Portal for more details: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/f22f2aca75404b5f84becb9b246023b2.html?locale=en-US Thanks & Best Regards, Minyu

entry.title: Re: Replace a value in a column based a value in another column
entry.content: Are you referring to the data wrangline UI of data management?

entry.title: Re: Data Action: Copying user-submitted data to another v...
entry.content:
Restrict data access user's own costcenter can be achieved with data access control on costcenter dimension. 

Lock  cost center after data publish can be achieved via data locking feature.

entry.title: Re: Working with RAP BO Events end-to-end - Event-driven-architecture - Event framework
entry.content:
@mlauber 

I have asked question on your blog only :). Question is related to this topic only. I am pasting it here:

I am seeing a weird issue with local event consumption of standard RAP events. So, I have seen if we create Purchase order from ME21N SAP GUI, standard RAP BO event Created of R_PurchaseOrderTP is triggered. Once, I implemented the local handler for this entity event, it doesn't trigger immediately. But once I go inside debugging mode, it starts triggering. 

Do we have to activate or run any program for this?

entry.title: Departure Offset in Days on Schedule
entry.content:
Hi all, I am trying to maintain a schedule in TM (S/4HANA) and would like to use the offset field as shown below. Apparently, the Departure Offset in Days field is not opened for update. Only the Arrival Offset (Days) field is opened for update.

Can anyone provide some pointers as to how we can have the departure Offset in Days open up for editing?

Cheers

SFC

entry.title: Audit Trail implementation in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm from SAP IT Quality Management team. We are trying to assure how audit trails are established for GxP critical L4 business process. I read a blog about the package of S_AUT but I need some assitance of where to start and how to implement. Our requirements are mentioned as below.

1. We have Risk assessments done for L4 Business process and identified the GxP critical BP but unable to co-releate with the functionality of audit trail.

2. How to verify that all of these critical business process has audit trail enabled? If there are any gaps how can this be identified? 

3. Where to define the retention period of these logs? 

4. These audit logs needs to be reviewed periodically as per the Data Integrity standards. Is there a way right way to verify these logs and find any non-conformance activities.

5. What needs to be considered by implementing this functionality by avoiding the impact on system performance?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Pricing of SAP IAG
entry.content: https://support.sap.com/content/dam/support/en_us/library/ssp/my-support/systems-installations/system-measurement/cloud-saas-application-usage/sap-cloud-identity-access-governance.pdf

entry.title: Spool not getting generated in adobe form, pdf also not visible
entry.content:
Hi all,

this is my code, could someone please help.

APPEND ls_hu_shplabel TO <lt_printout_hu_shplabel>.
* ENDIF.

ls_outputparams-nodialog = abap_false.
* ls_outputparams-getpdf = abap_true.
ls_outputparams-getxml = abap_true.
ls_outputparams-reqnew = abap_true.
ls_outputparams-reqimm = abap_true.
ls_outputparams-pdftagged = abap_true.
* ls_outputparams-dest = 'LP01'.

CALL FUNCTION 'FP_JOB_OPEN'
CHANGING
ie_outputparams = ls_outputparams
EXCEPTIONS
cancel = 1
usage_error = 2
system_error = 3
internal_error = 4
OTHERS = 5.
IF sy-subrc IS NOT INITIAL.
CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>msg_helper_add_symsg
CHANGING
co_message = lo_message.

CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>msg_helper_add_mo
EXPORTING
io_new_message = lo_message
iv_subobject = /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>sc_al_sobj_bf
iv_probclass = /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>sc_al_probclass_important
CHANGING
co_message = eo_message.
CLEAR lo_message.
RETURN.
ENDIF.

"Get Form Function
TRY.
CALL FUNCTION 'FP_FUNCTION_MODULE_NAME'
EXPORTING
i_name = 'ZAF_EWM_HU_SHPLABEL' "ip_form_name
IMPORTING
e_funcname = lv_function_name.
CATCH cx_fp_api.
CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>msg_helper_add_symsg
CHANGING
co_message = lo_message.

CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>msg_helper_add_mo
EXPORTING
io_new_message = lo_message
iv_subobject = /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>sc_al_sobj_bf
iv_probclass = /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>sc_al_probclass_important
CHANGING
co_message = eo_message.
CLEAR lo_message.
RETURN.
ENDTRY.

cs_docparams-langu = sy-langu.
CALL FUNCTION lv_function_name
EXPORTING
/1bcdwb/docparams = cs_docparams
lt_hu_shplabel = <lt_printout_hu_shplabel>
IMPORTING
/1bcdwb/formoutput = es_formoutput
EXCEPTIONS
usage_error = 1
system_error = 2
internal_error = 3
OTHERS = 4.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
ENDIF.

"close the spool job
CALL FUNCTION 'FP_JOB_CLOSE'
IMPORTING
e_result = es_joboutput
EXCEPTIONS
usage_error = 1
system_error = 2
internal_error = 3
OTHERS = 4.
IF sy-subrc NE 0.
CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>msg_helper_add_symsg
CHANGING
co_message = lo_message.

CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>msg_helper_add_mo
EXPORTING
io_new_message = lo_message
iv_subobject = /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>sc_al_sobj_bf
iv_probclass = /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>sc_al_probclass_important
CHANGING
co_message = eo_message.
CLEAR lo_message.
RETURN.
ENDIF.

es_joboutput-outputdone = abap_true.

entry.title: Re: ABAP code or scripting in CI-DS where source and target both are IBP
entry.content: If source is IBP table(s), i'm afraid there is no ABAP code or script can be used. If source is IBP related ODP/Extractors like /IBP/ORDER_KF, then ABAP query can be used.

entry.title: Re: Notification for work order Clean Up
entry.content:
Greetings,

the tick is selected by default if you use GUI transactions:

In case of Fiori it is not selected by default.

I think here you have four options:

  • raise an OSS ticket to SAP and ask them whs it is not default behavioue the same in GUI and Fiori (please mind the for my example I used the same order number) @SAPSupport
  • use GUI or run GUI transactions from launchpad (omit using Fiori applications)
  • develop a program and use it a job which would daily run and close all notifications with TECO order (perhaps additionally close only if order was TECE X days or more ago in cas someone revokey TECO status for some reason)
  • close notifoications manually in set periods - set a remainder end of every month and close them

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Gigya - How to capture phone number in OOTB phoneNumber field from Registration screen?
entry.content:
Currently in one of a project we are storing phone number in a custom field data.phoneNumber during registration. However, we are planning to use OOTB phoneNumber field. But the attrbute is not allowing to map with input field in Registration screen.

Please share a solution how we can store in the OOTB phoneNumber field from Registration screen?

If using meta tags then how the Javascript expression will be. Or From javascript parameters can we call Gigya API to set value to this phoneNumber field? Or please suggest any other approach then will work.

entry.title: Re: Configure a tile on SAP Build Work Zone to manage Decision artifacts
entry.content:
Hi @AlexGiguere , yes that is the attribute I am talking about from service key <"html5-apps-repo": {"app_host_id": ...> as this attribute need to be added to the destination for the application to appear in HTML5 repository.

Once you generate new service key monitor the number of app host ID's increased and if you see the Studio Home application in HTML5 repository.

Thanks,

Smita Patil

entry.title: Re: Trigger event and Receive event don't work in Data Variables Logic Canvas
entry.content:
This is the classic case for using the trigger event, to refresh data. But it does not work to trigger an event on the data variable canvas. 😔 If I want that I have to move the data logic to the main logic canvas and create the events there ... not as elegant but not terrible.

You said "instead I need to edit the trigger node and set the receive event there" -- what do you mean?

entry.title: Re: Maintain PIR APP- Sales Quantity
entry.content: Pls check the strategy group of material, If the  strategy group is "40", and when you create the SO, it will be shown in this Fiori app, and it will consume   the PIR Qty as the "Consumption Mode".

entry.title: Re: Custom entity, $count, $skip, $top not supported
entry.content: This doesn't change anything. What I observed in the meantime, if I preview the custom entity in service binding, it works correct. Also $count, $top, $skip are working. It only fails, if I try to get data (lineItem reference) in Object Page

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Insights filters
entry.content: You will only see customer/vendor data if your user has the role PERSONAL_DATA assigned, as described here https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-insights/administration-guide/roles-and-default-role-collections

entry.title: Re: Generate dynamic file name from Email content
entry.content:
Have you thought about writing a short JAVA mapping. The main payload you can stream through - so only manipulating the Header parameters there.

Regards
    Helmut

entry.content: I added some more code to my question. It now also shows projection view and metadata extension I use

entry.title: Re: Serial numbers for refurbishment
entry.content:
Greetings,

can you confirm that you serializing procedures include PPAU with value 03

1. EXAMPLE WITH PPAU 01

2. EXAMPLE WITH PPAU 03

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 24: Terraform - Getting Started
entry.content:
In this tutorial, we introduce Terraform for BTP, a tool for automating BTP infrastructure tasks. It allows users to script and automate the creation of directories, sub accounts, services, and more. Terraform can be compared with predefined boosters, enabling custom automation scripts. The tutorial explains how to easily get started with Terraform by downloading it from the official website, installing it on Windows, and setting it up for use. The next episode promises to demonstrate how to effectively use Terraform for automation tasks.

Takeaways

  • Terraform is a tool used to automate BTP infrastructure.
  • For BTP, Terraform can be used to create directories, super accounts, services, and more through scripting.
  • With Terraform, users can create scripts for automating actions, similar to predefined boosters in BTP.
  • Boosters in BTP are predefined sets of actions that can be executed with a single click, and Terraform allows you to create your own boosters.
  • Terraform scripts can be triggered manually or automatically using pipelines for further automation.
  • To get started with Terraform, you can run it locally or on HashiCop Terraform infrastructure.
  • The easiest way to start using Terraform is by downloading it from the official Terraform website.
  • On the Terraform website, you can select the appropriate version for your operating system (e.g., Windows).
  • Once downloaded, unzip the Terraform zip file, which contains the terraform.exe file.
  • Place the terraform.exe file in the same folder as your script to set up your environment.
  • The next episode will demonstrate how to use Terraform after the installation process.

entry.title: Re: how to make an Optional inspection characteristic Required after a certain number of inspection
entry.content:
Greetings,

have you explored the possibilities of dynamic modification at characteristic level? Perhaps it is not relevant since you can't really manipulate if characteristic is mandatory or not but you can manipulate that characteristic is skipped under certain conditions - in this example SKIP would equal not mandatory.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Business One client does not show menu
entry.content:
Hi frodohtx 

In SAP Business One go to

- Window > Main Menu and check it is active (or Ctrl+0).
- Select any modules, for example Administration > Choose company
- Window > Cascade, now main menu should be displayed.

In the main menu screen, click on the Form settings, ensure that all boxes are "Ticked". Update the screen.

 

Make sure the use has full authorization and a professional license. 

 

Now check if the main menu is visible when logging into the client.

Kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Integration Suite - New Message Metrics
entry.content:
Hello @MartyMcCormick 

We are planning the migration of the Cloud Integration Tenant (Neo single tenant) to Cloud Foundry with 2 Tenants!

In the Neo SCPI currently I'm not able to measure any message sizes, neither during a specific period!
So, we have no idea what SAP finally will measure in CF based on the current consumption in Neo SCPI.

Do you know if SAP can build such a measurement report in our Neo environment?

Sincerely Bruno

entry.title: Re: APIs Billing Document can create the Withholding tax...

APIs create a billing document that does not support the interface WHT amount.

Does the system have APIs for updating the Withholding tax in AR?

Please recommend.

Thanks,

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: EHP5 to EHP6 upgrade (SAP HR)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are going to upgrade Ehp 5 to EHp6 . What are the SAP HCM side pre-requisites/to be performed.   If is there any standard process or guide . Kindly help me on this.

Regards,Jaya
